generic_rules: Focus repairs on the scope of the validator error; type-level errors require type-level fixes.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid declarations within AGREE expressions.
Repairs should not introduce new architecture; focus on correcting existing expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq` to define helper variables for complex expressions.
Valid AGREE scalar types are `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to fix type-level errors with implementation-level changes.
Avoid adding new AADL architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on expression correction.
Do not introduce unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
